overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game, depicting a walk through a futuristic black market weapons store. The scene features dark industrial interiors illuminated by neon lighting, with holographic weapon displays floating above display tables and various NPCs browsing the merchandise.

events.description: shirtless tattooed NPC approaches the counter where the player is standing
camera moves past the counter into the main showroom area

agents.ego_description: Standing at the service counter as an NPC approaches, then beginning to walk forward into the main store area

entered.detail: Glass counter with weapons and tools displayed on the surface

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a service counter in a dimly lit cyberpunk weapons store. A shirtless tattooed man approaches the counter and gestures while speaking. The player then moves forward past the counter into the main showroom area, leaving the service desk behind.

events.description: passing by prominent holographic weapon displays floating above the display tables

agents.ego_description: Walking steadily through the main showroom, passing weapon tables and observing the holographic displays

notable_agents.action: Two NPCs standing and conversing in the middle of the showroom floor near the displays

entered.detail: Floating wireframe hologram of a submachine gun rotating in the air
Long table with various firearms and weapons laid out for display
Upper level balcony with metal railings overlooking the showroom floor
Red neon light strips illuminating the right side of the showroom

segments.scene_description: Moving through the main showroom of the weapons store, the camera passes display tables with holographic weapon projections floating above them. Red neon lights illuminate the right side while an upper balcony overlooks the space. Two NPCs stand conversing in the middle of the floor as the player walks past.

scene_state.functional_zone: rear showroom with large holographic advertisements

approaching the exit doorway at the back of the store

entered.detail: Large red wireframe hologram of a revolver floating prominently in the air
Wall of glowing advertising screens and monitors displaying weapon ads

Glass display case with weapons inside positioned near the exit

segments.scene_description: In the rear section of the weapons store, large holographic gun advertisements float overhead, including a prominent red wireframe revolver. The camera passes illuminated advertising screens on the left and a patron in a red jacket near the displays, continuing toward the exit doorway visible at the back of the showroom.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a dim service area through the expansive, neon-lit interior of a futuristic weapons showroom. It begins at a service counter where a shirtless tattooed man gestures while speaking, before the camera moves forward and leaves the desk behind to enter the main floor. As the camera glides through the showroom, the space opens up to reveal holographic weapon projections floating above display tables, red neon lighting on the right, and an upper balcony overlooking NPCs conversing in the center. The scene then shifts toward the rear of the store, passing illuminated advertising screens and a patron in a red jacket. Finally, the camera moves beneath large overhead holographic advertisements, including a red wireframe revolver, as it heads toward the exit doorway at the back of the room.
